name: Dolce Torinese Italian Chocolate Terrine from Torino
recipeIngredient: 250g quality bittersweet chocolate, broken into pieces
8 savoiardi (sponge fingers biscuits), cut into 1cm x 1/2cm pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly oil a 5-cup loaf tin and line it with foil, ensuring the ends are also covered.
2. Melt chocolate over hot water, then stir in Amaretto and cool to room temperature.
3. Cream butter until light and fluffy. Beat in caster sugar, then add egg yolks one at a time.
4. Stir in almonds and cooled chocolate mixture. In a clean bowl, beat egg whites and salt until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold 1/3 of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture using a rubber spatula.
6. Fold in the remaining egg whites in the same manner.
7. Add cut biscuits and fold thoroughly.
8. Pour mixture into prepared loaf tin and smooth with a spatula.
9. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
10. Unmold before serving by inverting onto a chilled platter; dust with sifted icing sugar and slice.
